_meta.purpose: Synthetic FAQ dataset for the public portfolio demo. Not real customer or product information.
_meta.license: MIT (sample data — free to reuse for demo purposes)

chunks.q: What is the Whistleblowing Hotline service?
chunks.a: Whistleblowing Hotline is a confidential reporting channel that lets employees and stakeholders report ethics or compliance concerns. Acme Services operates the intake, triage, and case-management workflow.
chunks.text:
S: Whistleblowing Hotline
Q: What is the Whistleblowing Hotline service?
A: Whistleblowing Hotline is a confidential reporting channel that lets employees and stakeholders report ethics or compliance concerns. Acme Services operates the intake, triage, and case-management workflow.

chunks.a: Reports can be submitted anonymously or with attribution. Reporter identity, when shared, is held within a restricted case-management system separate from the client organization's HR systems.
chunks.text:
S: Whistleblowing Hotline
Q: How is reporter identity protected?
A: Reports can be submitted anonymously or with attribution. Reporter identity, when shared, is held within a restricted case-management system separate from the client organization's HR systems.

chunks.q: What is the Due Diligence service?
chunks.a: Due Diligence is a structured review of a counterparty's background, ownership, regulatory record, and reputational signals. Common use cases include vendor onboarding, M&A targets, and partnership screening.
chunks.text:
S: Due Diligence
Q: What is the Due Diligence service?
A: Due Diligence is a structured review of a counterparty's background, ownership, regulatory record, and reputational signals. Common use cases include vendor onboarding, M&A targets, and partnership screening.

chunks.q: What is the Mystery Shopping service?
chunks.a: Mystery Shopping deploys trained evaluators who experience a service as ordinary customers and report on quality, SOP adherence, and brand consistency. Useful for retail, hospitality, and contact-centre programs.
chunks.text:
S: Mystery Shopping
Q: What is the Mystery Shopping service?
A: Mystery Shopping deploys trained evaluators who experience a service as ordinary customers and report on quality, SOP adherence, and brand consistency. Useful for retail, hospitality, and contact-centre programs.

chunks.q: What is the Background Check service?
chunks.a: Background Check verifies education credentials, employment history, criminal records, and reference statements for candidates and active employees. Scope is configurable per role tier.
chunks.text:
S: Background Check
Q: What is the Background Check service?
A: Background Check verifies education credentials, employment history, criminal records, and reference statements for candidates and active employees. Scope is configurable per role tier.

chunks.q: What is the Market Research service?
chunks.a: Market Research delivers primary-data studies (interviews, surveys, mystery-visit panels) and secondary-source synthesis to inform product, pricing, and go-to-market decisions.
chunks.text:
S: Market Research
Q: What is the Market Research service?
A: Market Research delivers primary-data studies (interviews, surveys, mystery-visit panels) and secondary-source synthesis to inform product, pricing, and go-to-market decisions.

chunks.q: What is the Asset Verification service?
chunks.a: Asset Verification confirms the existence, ownership, and condition of physical or corporate assets. Used by lenders, insurers, and counterparties before entering large transactions.
chunks.text:
S: Asset Verification
Q: What is the Asset Verification service?
A: Asset Verification confirms the existence, ownership, and condition of physical or corporate assets. Used by lenders, insurers, and counterparties before entering large transactions.

chunks.q: What is the Contact Verification service?
chunks.a: Contact Verification re-establishes current contact details (address, employer, phone) for individuals whose details have become stale — typically commissioned by lenders, insurers, and HR functions.
chunks.text:
S: Contact Verification
Q: What is the Contact Verification service?
A: Contact Verification re-establishes current contact details (address, employer, phone) for individuals whose details have become stale — typically commissioned by lenders, insurers, and HR functions.

chunks.q: What is the Compliance Audit service?
chunks.a: Compliance Audit reviews a client's policies, transaction records, and operating practices against a specified regulatory or contractual standard, producing a gap report and remediation roadmap.
chunks.text:
S: Compliance Audit
Q: What is the Compliance Audit service?
A: Compliance Audit reviews a client's policies, transaction records, and operating practices against a specified regulatory or contractual standard, producing a gap report and remediation roadmap.

chunks.q: How long does a typical Compliance Audit engagement take?
chunks.a: Engagements range from two to twelve weeks depending on scope, document volume, and the number of business units involved. A scoping call is needed before quoting.
chunks.text:
S: Compliance Audit
Q: How long does a typical Compliance Audit engagement take?
A: Engagements range from two to twelve weeks depending on scope, document volume, and the number of business units involved. A scoping call is needed before quoting.

chunks.q: What is the Claim Review service?
chunks.a: Claim Review independently assesses insurance or warranty claims for accuracy, supporting documentation, and policy alignment, helping carriers manage payout risk and recover overpayments where appropriate.
chunks.text:
S: Claim Review
Q: What is the Claim Review service?
A: Claim Review independently assesses insurance or warranty claims for accuracy, supporting documentation, and policy alignment, helping carriers manage payout risk and recover overpayments where appropriate.

chunks.q: What services does Acme Services offer?
chunks.a: Acme Services offers nine consulting services: Whistleblowing Hotline, Due Diligence, Mystery Shopping, Background Check, Market Research, Asset Verification, Contact Verification, Compliance Audit, and Claim Review. Each is delivered by a dedicated practice team and can be combined for multi-track engagements.
chunks.text:
S: General
Q: What services does Acme Services offer?
A: Acme Services offers nine consulting services: Whistleblowing Hotline, Due Diligence, Mystery Shopping, Background Check, Market Research, Asset Verification, Contact Verification, Compliance Audit, and Claim Review. Each is delivered by a dedicated practice team and can be combined for multi-track engagements.

chunks.q: How can I contact Acme Services?
chunks.a: You can reach Acme Services at info@acmeservices.example.com or +1 (555) 010-0100. Our team responds within one business day.
chunks.text:
S: General
